case.question: Which option (A, B, C, or D) is an exact visual match to the TARGET shield?
case.rubric: Option B is the only exact match because it correctly maintains all four specific elements of the target (wavy lines, 4 circles, star, checkerboard), whereas A, C, and D each have one altered element in a specific quadrant.

planner_focus.weakness: finding the only exact match among near duplicates with tiny differences

case.prompt: Create one BabyVision-style visual logical puzzle image. Use a clean printed worksheet style on a white background, crisp geometric shapes, small labels, no photorealism, no watermark, and no explanatory answer key. It must be unambiguous and solvable from the image alone. Do not include the written question in the image. A clean printed worksheet puzzle on a pure white background, using crisp black-and-white vector-style geometric marks. No photorealism, no watermark, no explanatory answer key. At the top center, a large shield shape divided into four quadrants, with the word 'TARGET' clearly printed above it. The TARGET shield contains the following exact features: Top-Left quadrant has 3 horizontal wavy lines; Top-Right quadrant has 4 solid black circles; Bottom-Left quadrant has 1 solid black star; Bottom-Right quadrant has a black-and-white checkerboard pattern. Below the TARGET, there is a spaced horizontal row of four smaller shields, perfectly labeled 'A', 'B', 'C', and 'D' respectively. Shield A contains 3 horizontal straight lines (instead of wavy), 4 black circles, 1 black star, and a checkerboard pattern. Shield B is an exact identical copy of the TARGET. Shield C contains 3 wavy lines, exactly 3 black circles (instead of 4), 1 black star, and a checkerboard pattern. Shield D contains 3 wavy lines, 4 black circles, 1 solid black heart (instead of a star), and a checkerboard pattern. All outlines and symbols must be cleanly drawn and easily distinguishable.
